title: Blossom Skyblock
body:
![Logo largo Grivyzom](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b4743ecdf573b784d7065e1a60ab075fe2f88477.png)
A specially designed Modpack to take the core minecraft experience to the next level.
Features

  • 🌍 4 Seasons - The world's weather conditions change as time goes on.
  • ❄️ Body Temperature - Get ready for winter, and stay comfortable and safe.
  • 🥦 New Vegetables & Fruits - We've added a host of new fruits and vegetables for you to grow.
  • 🍖 New Foods - Now you will be able to prepare a wide variety of recipes!
  • 📚 Useful Enchantments - Find a variety of useful new enchantments.
  • 🛠️ Jobs - Assign up to 2 jobs to receive money and even more XP depending on your Level
  • 🏝️ NEW Islands - Come and discover new islands where you can start your game.
  • ⚔️ Fight - Travel to new Farming Zones where enemies will drop items to help you on your adventure.
  • 🪙 Trade - with bronze / silver / gold coins. You also get them from certain mobs

    • Multiplayer

    Blossom Skyland is made to be played on a server.
    Settle in groups or alone and start your adventure. Create your Island and work to improve it, build your town, get married and leave your name in the History!

  • 🛜 Server Recently Opened - Join an unspoiled world and be one of the first pioneers!
  • 🔊 Join our Community - Enter our discord server to meet new people!
  • 🍻 Play with friends - Obvious! Like any experience, it will always be much better with a good company.

    • Join our Community by clicking here!

    Are you a non-premium User?

    Well, no problem!
    Below we leave you our wikipedia with which you can get a guide to the installation of the mods.

    Head over to our wikipedia with this link
